name: ctxclp_run
description: Execute a shell command and return compressed output via ContextClipper. Saves 80-95% of tokens compared to raw output. The response includes a [CTXCLP:raw=<uuid>] footer — call ctxclp_fetch with that uuid to retrieve the full uncompressed output if needed.

max_tokens.description: Maximum tokens in the compressed output (optional)

stream.description: Use streaming mode for long-running commands (optional)
